description: Summarize all workspace artifacts into a tight executive recap — reads persisted JSON from the workspace, not conversation memory. Use this instead of summarizing from memory.
usage: summary of everything so far, rundown, wrap up, what have we done, overview of session, what do we have

target.description: Filter to artifacts related to this target, or 'all' for everything

length.description: How tight: oneliner, short (3-4 sentences), or full (paragraph per artifact)
